module:
Base abstractions for chunking strategies.

This module defines the core interfaces that all chunking implementations
must adhere to, ensuring consistent behavior across different strategies.

ChunkingStrategyType.docstring: Enumeration of chunking strategy types for type-safe registration and usage.

ChunkingBoundary.docstring:
Represents a boundary in text for chunking purposes.
    This is used as a common format for boundary information
    between linguistic analysis and chunking strategies.

length.docstring: Get the length of this boundary in characters.

ChunkingStrategy.docstring:
Abstract base class for chunking strategies.
    
    All concrete chunking strategies must implement this interface
    to ensure consistent behavior across different implementations.

chunk_text.docstring:
Divide text into chunks according to the strategy.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to chunk
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (optional)
            
        Returns:
            List of chunk dictionaries with content and metadata

capabilities.docstring:
Get the capabilities of this chunking strategy.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of capabilities and their values

BoundaryProvider.docstring:
Integration interface for providing text boundaries.
    Establishes a formal boundary between chunking and linguistic subsystems.

capabilities.docstring:
Get declared capabilities of this boundary provider.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of capabilities with their supported values

get_boundaries.docstring:
Get text boundaries of specified types.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to analyze
            boundary_types: Types of boundaries to detect
            **options: Additional options for boundary detection
            
        Returns:
            List of ChunkingBoundary objects
